privileged_info_summary: The task uses three real, publicly accessible websites: books.toscrape.com and quotes.toscrape.com are confirmed sandbox environments specifically designed for learning web scraping, while crawler-test.com is a real public testing ground for web crawlers. All three domains respond to HTTP requests (200 OK status). The configured export path is /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/competitive_benchmark.csv and report path is /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/competitive_report.txt. The minimum row count expectation of 12 rows is reasonable given that 15 URLs are specified (5 per domain). However, some specific URL paths mentioned in the task description for crawler-test.com (such as /titles/long_title and /headers/h1) do not actually exist on that website and return HTTP 404 errors.
